fiction.title: JUDGE STONE
fiction.author: Viola Davis and James Patterson
fiction.description: Judge Mary Stone oversees an ethically complex case in her courtroom in Union Springs, Ala.

fiction.title: THE CORRESPONDENT
fiction.author: Virginia Evans
fiction.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

fiction.title: BLOODLUST
fiction.author: Sandra Brown
fiction.description: The mutual attraction between Detective Mitch Haskell and his therapist may hinder his attempt to avenge his murdered wife.

fiction.title: MY HUSBAND'S WIFE
fiction.author: Alice Feeney
fiction.description: In an old house in a seaside town, things may not be what they appear to be.

fiction.title: INNAMORATA
fiction.author: Ava Reid
fiction.description: Passion and revenge fuel Agnes as she seeks to recapture her family’s honor.

nonfiction.title: STRIPPED DOWN
nonfiction.author: Bunnie Xo
nonfiction.description: The host of the “Dumb Blonde Podcast” shares how redemption was an important part of her journey toward reaching her goals.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: YOU WITH THE SAD EYES
nonfiction.author: Christina Applegate
nonfiction.description: The Emmy Award-winning actress, who received a multiple sclerosis diagnosis in 2021, shares personal stories.

nonfiction.title: KIDS, WAIT TILL YOU HEAR THIS!
nonfiction.author: Liza Minnelli, as told to Michael Feinstein, with Josh Getlin and Heidi Evans
nonfiction.description: The EGOT icon shares some of the highs and lows of her life and career.

nonfiction.title: CHAIN OF IDEAS
nonfiction.author: Ibram X. Kendi
nonfiction.description: The author of “How to Be an Antiracist” and “Stamped From the Beginning” examines the impact of great replacement theory.
